description.unified: Deals Physical DMG to a random enemy 3 times, applies [[Mortal Wound]->[Grievous Wound]] stacks 1, and increases Physical DMG taken by [25%->30%] for [10 sec->4 sec].

For [10 sec->7 sec], increases all allies’ ATK by [250->393*(1+0.3*Skill Level)] and Physical [Dodge->Evasion] by [250->300], and grants self [[Specter's Breath]->[Breath of Death]] for [10 sec->7 sec]. [Breath of Death] : Attack Speed increases by [250->30%], damage dealt to enemies increases by [20%->25%], and all Physical Attacks are evaded.

Moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, consuming all [[Mortal Wound]->[Grievous Wound]] stacks on the target and dealing additional Physical DMG per 1 stack consumed. On Critical Hit, [(added) applies Bleed stacks 1] and resets the cooldown of [[Hack]->[Slaughter]]. [(added) Bleed : Deals 5% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 20 times.]

Critical Rate increases by 300. [(added) Every 10 sec], when a Normal Attack lands as a Critical Hit, deals Physical DMG 6 times, with a 50% chance per hit to apply [[Mortal Wound]->[Grievous Wound]] stacks 1. [(added) [Grievous Wound] : Deals 15% ATK Physical DoT every 1 sec for 15 sec, stacking up to 5 times.]

light.unified: The target is changed to the enemy with the highest ATK, [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1].

dark.unified: Normal Attack damage increases by [100%->115%] for the duration.

light.unified: Mana cost increases by [1->1000] and damage increases by 100%.
The chance for [[Rend]->[Rend]] to apply [[Mortal Wound]->[Fatal Wound]] stacks is changed to [50%->100%]. [(removed) Each attack recovers 300 mana].

description.unified: [[No Mercy]->[Merciless]] Dispels all negative effects from self, and recovers Mana by {0} upon Critical Hit.
[Curtain of Darkness] increases duration by [(added) 3 sec] and boosts DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%. [(removed) recovers own Mana by 150 every sec].
[Hack] increases DMG by [50%->{0}%] and [(added) applies 1 stack of [Bleed] to the target on Crit], [(removed) increases own ATK Spd by {0} for 5 sec].

dark.unified: On critical hit, Attack Speed is increased by [300->300%] and Critical Damage by 60% for 5 sec. This effect [can only be triggered once every 5 sec.->can only be triggered once every 5 sec.]

description.unified: When using Normal Attacks or [[Mortal Wound]->[Rend]], has a {0}% chance to apply 1 additional stacks of [[Mortal Wound]->[Fatal Wound]] and deal additional Physical Damage equal to {1}% of Attack Power per [[Mortal Wound]->[Fatal Wound]] stack.
